prompt: Premium product photography. Sleek matte white skincare tube on warm travertine stone, soft parchment cream background with linen texture, warm golden light from above-right. The tube has a cream label with a circular monogram (the letter K inside a thin circle) at the top of the label, and below it MAISON K in elegant uppercase letters. The label looks like a real luxury skincare brand. A smooth river stone and dried eucalyptus leaf at lower right. 4:5 portrait. Avoid: generic stock photography, blurry labels, cluttered backgrounds, cheap plastic packaging, neon colors.
